issues.plain_language_description: The primary banner image is missing an alternative text description, making it completely invisible to blind users.
issues.recommended_fix: Add a meaningful alt attribute to the tag describing the visual content of the image.
evidence: Image tag is missing the alt attribute entirely.

issues.plain_language_description: The product preview image uses a generic file name ('image_placeholder_123.jpg') as its alt description, providing no context.
issues.recommended_fix: Replace the placeholder file name alt with a brief description of the product image.
evidence: alt text is the literal filename 'image_placeholder_123.jpg'

issues.plain_language_description: The link text 'click here' is meaningless out of context, making it hard for screen reader users to know where the link goes.
issues.recommended_fix: Change the link text to describe the target destination, for example, 'go to your dashboard'.

issues.plain_language_description: The search input field lacks a programmatic label or name, making it unlabeled for screen readers.
issues.recommended_fix: Add a <label> element associated with the input by its id, or add an aria-label attribute directly.
evidence: Role is textbox but has no programmatic name.

issues.plain_language_description: The text paragraph has a contrast ratio of 2.1:1, which is below the WCAG requirement of 4.5:1.
issues.recommended_fix: Darken the text color or lighten the background color to achieve a contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1.
evidence: Computed contrast ratio is 2.1:1 (normal text, required threshold is 4.5:1)

issues.plain_language_description: The button does not display any visible focus ring when navigated to via keyboard.
issues.recommended_fix: Ensure that :focus styles are not removed via outline: none without providing a distinct visual alternative.

issues.plain_language_description: The dialog modal traps keyboard focus. When open, pressing Escape does not close the dialog or restore focus back to the triggering element.
issues.recommended_fix: Ensure keyboard focus is restored to the triggering element when the modal closes, and that users can escape the modal using the Escape key.
evidence: After activating trigger and pressing Escape, focus did not return to the trigger.

issues.plain_language_description: The close/delete button has a bounding box of 12x12px, which is smaller than the recommended minimum of 24x24px.
issues.recommended_fix: Increase the padding or height/width of the button target to at least 24px.
evidence: Target size is 12x12px, which is below the 24x24px threshold.
